Notes: Top level composite SpaManager is present.
Jacuzzi behavior is separated in its own region.
Jacuzzi region initializes to JacuzziOff.
JacuzziOff state is present.
JacuzziOn composite state is present.
JacuzziOff transitions to JacuzziOn on turnOnJacuzzi.
JacuzziOn transitions to JacuzziOff on turnOffJacuzzi.
Pressure region initializes to Level1 when active.
Low pressure Level1 state is present.
Increase transition from Level1 to Level2 is present.
Medium pressure Level2 state is present.
Increase transition from Level2 to Level3 is present.
Decrease transition from Level2 to Level1 is present.
High pressure Level3 state is present.
Decrease transition from Level3 to Level2 is present.
H state is included and used as the return target after pause.
Pattern selection is modeled with a guarded selectPattern transition while preserving active behavior.
JacuzziPaused state is present.
Pause transition from active Jacuzzi operation to JacuzziPaused is present.
JacuzziPaused returns to H after 2 minutes.
Sauna behavior is separated in its own region.
Sauna region initializes to SaunaOff.
SaunaOff state is present.
SaunaOn composite state is present.
SaunaOff transitions to SaunaOn on turnOnSauna.
SaunaOn transitions to SaunaOff on turnOffSauna.
Heating behavior is modeled in a separate region.
Heating region initializes to HeatingOn.
HeatingOn represents the stove heating state.
HeatingOn transitions to HeatingOff when hot enough.
The heating off transition uses temp >= 90.
HeatingOff represents the nonheating idle state.
HeatingOff transitions back to HeatingOn when temperature drops.
The reheat transition uses temp < 85.
Fan behavior is modeled in a separate region.
Fan region initializes to FanOff.
FanOff state is present.
Fan activation after sustained high humidity is captured through FanMonitoring then after 3min to FanOn.
High humidity condition and 3 minute duration are represented by guard plus timed transition.
Water dispersion behavior is modeled in a separate region.
Water region initializes to WaterReady which represents availability.
WaterReady represents the idle ready state for dispensing.
Dispensing is modeled as Ready to Cooldown then back after 15 minutes which is behaviorally equivalent.
Humidity and fan guards are explicit and the cooldown state enforces the 15 minute limit.
Extra states such as monitoring cooldown active and pattern selection are reasonable refinements.
No fundamentally incorrect extra transitions are present.
Extra guards such as valid pattern range and humidity reset are consistent with the description.
Actions such as heat runFan setPattern and disperseWater are appropriate.
Additional composite structure for active Jacuzzi behavior is reasonable.
Additional pressure and pattern regions are appropriate for independent Jacuzzi features.
No incorrect extra history states are present.
